name: Greek Chicken with Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Place feta in water and set aside.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a skillet and brown the chicken pieces.
3. Transfer the chicken to a platter.
4. Add the remaining olive oil to the pan, then add the sliced onions.
5. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes until the onions start to brown.
6. Add garlic and cook for another 5 minutes.
7. Add the chopped tomatoes, liquid, oregano, and pepper.
8. Place the chicken pieces in the sauce.
9. Bring to a boil and then reduce to a simmer.
10. Cook for 40 minutes.
11. Remove feta from water and arrange on top of the chicken.
12. Cover and cook for another 15 minutes.
